title: Mistralia gnidium
uses: Mistralia gnidium has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, where it is valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its leaves and stems have been employed to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
